_merge_note: Consolidated 2026-07-08: reconstructed from every same-day commit (cloud cron 57a0ffd5 + local gap-recovery/fix-verification runs e0ca717d/3e1562b7/45a2222b/886944c3 + final chatham_house RSS run) after several ad-hoc local invocations without --resume clobbered each other's diagnostic logs during today's SSRN/ARK/Damodaran/residential work. The fix (run_concepts_residential_local.sh now always passes --resume) prevents this going forward for the residential wrapper; manual one-off CLI testing can still overwrite if run without --resume.
